---
title: "Learn PySDM"
description: "Learning notes that connect concepts, APIs, and examples"
lang: en
page-layout: article
listing:
  contents: posts/learn-pysdm
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  feed: true
---

A learning path from the first encounter with PySDM to reading experiments in the literature. Each note has one question, a minimal piece of code, and a checkpoint leading to the next experiment.
